constraints.name: Emergency Escape Non-Impedance
constraints.description: Must not add any operational step or increase force beyond DIN EN 179 (lever, ≤70N) or DIN EN 1125 (panic bar, single motion) requirements. Single-motion release is non-negotiable and product is certified to this standard.

constraints.name: Mechanical Alarm Independence
constraints.description: Alarm horn must function at 0V — no electrical power whatsoever. EltVTR and fire safety codes mandate mechanical trigger as primary system. IoT module is supervisory only. This is a fundamental physics and regulatory requirement that cannot be waived.
constraints.thresholdUnit: V (minimum operating voltage for alarm trigger)

constraints.name: Wireless Range Limitation
constraints.description: Integrated 868.3 MHz EasyWave transmitter reaches ~30m line-of-sight. Concrete, steel, and building geometry reduce effective range. Single repeater extends to ~60m. Multi-stage repeater chains add infrastructure cost and latency.
constraints.thresholdUnit: m (integrated TX, no repeater); 60m with one repeater stage
affectedMarketsHint: Data Centers with Dense RF Shielding

constraints.name: IoT Battery Life Floor
constraints.description: Radio module draws 9–35mA during active transmission. On a 9V block battery (~500mAh), high door-event frequency can exhaust battery below the 2-year maintenance target. Battery life not published by GfS for IoT variant.
affectedMarketsHint: Remote Industrial Sites with Infrequent Maintenance Access

constraints.name: Retrofit-Only Surface Mount
constraints.description: Surface-mounted device only. Cannot be flush-integrated into door or frame. Creates visible protrusion that may be unacceptable in premium architectural contexts or high-security flush-door applications.

constraints.name: EasyWave Protocol Lock-In
constraints.description: 868 MHz EasyWave is a proprietary GfS protocol. No native interoperability with BACnet, KNX, Zigbee, Z-Wave, LoRaWAN, or Matter. Integration requires GfS-specific wireless BUS gateway, creating vendor dependency.

constraints.name: IoT Price Premium
constraints.description: Pre-alarm + radio variant retails at ~730 EUR. Target ceiling is <2x basic non-IoT variant. At scale deployments (100+ doors), cost differential requires documented ROI (labor reduction, compliance automation, insurance) to justify procurement.
constraints.thresholdUnit: x price multiple vs. basic mechanical variant

constraints.name: GDPR Monitoring Data Compliance
constraints.description: Door-open timestamps and access event logs may constitute personal data under GDPR (EU 2016/679) if attributable to identifiable individuals. Requires legal basis for processing, DPA with SaaS provider, and DPIA for high-risk systematic monitoring.

constraints.name: IP Protection Boundary
constraints.description: Only the IP45 outdoor variant (Art. 990000-IP) carries a published weather protection rating. Standard indoor variant has no published IP class. Wet, dusty, or corrosive environments risk electronic IoT module failure. IP65/IP69K required for washdown markets.
constraints.thresholdUnit: IP class (minimum published; IP65+ required for washdown environments)

constraints.name: EN 13637 / EltVTR Electrical Compliance
constraints.description: EN 13637 governs electrically controlled exit systems. Combined configurations (Türwächter + powered locking) must maintain fail-safe escape release. IoT module alone is compliant (supervisory only). System integrators combining with electromagnetic holders or electronic access control must certify the combined system.
affectedMarketsHint: Data Centers with Combined Access + Emergency Exit

sources.label: DIN EN 179 — Building hardware — Lever operated emergency exit devices (HOPPE reference)
